outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated volatility risk from negative short-term GEX; support zones likely tested on pullbacks
outlook.summary: Market extended above all visible strike concentrations with ITM calls providing layered support. Monthly reverse_smirk confirms bullish momentum, but extreme low PCR (0.03) signals potential overextension. Dealer hedging activity concentrated below spot creates structural support cascade.

levels.motivazione: Dominant weekly volume (215) - highest concentration across all datasets. Primary dealer hedging zone below spot creating strong support magnet.
Multi-expiry significance with 0DTE (31 vol) and WEEKLY (42 vol) alignment. Combined volume creates reinforced support confluence.
Highest monthly volume (67) establishing structural support. Bullish skew context strengthens this level as institutional anchor point.
Strong weekly volume (58) creating secondary support tier between 6300 and 6200 levels. Dealer accumulation zone.
Highest 0DTE volume (56) creating intraday price attraction. Negative GEX environment amplifies magnet effect on short-term price action.
